name: @platform/storage
description: Media storage abstraction for the Fanaa Platform AI Studio (PLATFORM.md §14). Defines the MediaStore contract, key-naming conventions, asset manifest validation, and ships a Cloudflare R2 adapter (S3-compatible via @aws-sdk/client-s3) + an in-memory adapter for tests. Presigned PUT URLs let browsers upload directly to R2 with no bytes through the Studio server.
